evidence: OSS API healthy on http://127.0.0.1:3099 (container PORT=5171). Registered tenant via POST /v1/auth/register, created incident via POST /v1/admin/incidents, proposed remediation via POST /api/v1/remediation with ecs.updateService + ecs.forceNewDeployment actions.
GET /api/v1/remediation/b9b289a3-61b3-4e1b-9f94-420f98e43ad7/proposal → HTTP 200 with steps[] listing AWS actions (ecs.updateService, ecs.forceNewDeployment).

POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve with admin JWT → HTTP 200, status=approved, approvedBy=qa-ac023-1783699428@example.com. ApproveRemediationUseCase calls approvalRepo.create() (PgApprovalRepository).
Second POST /api/v1/remediation/:id/approve → HTTP 409 CONFLICT (status completed before second call; duplicate approval rejected).
